scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.docker:dev:migrate: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile tools run --rm migrator
scripts.docker:dev:seed: docker compose --env-file .env.dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile tools run --rm seed
scripts.docker:prod:migrate: docker compose --env-file .env.prod -f compose.prod.yml --profile migrate run --rm migrator
